ddls:
CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "filing_date" TEXT /* Date the document was filed */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of document */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the document */,
  "amended_doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amended document, if applicable */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document (e.g., draft, submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the document */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES document_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES document_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_amended_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("amended_doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the document type (e.g., 10-Q, 8-K) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document type */,
  "type_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the document category (e.g., Quarterly Reports, Special Events) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the document category */,
  "category_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., legal, compliance, financial analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., legal, compliance, finance) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document version */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the versioned document */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the document version (e.g., draft, submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  "version_created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_versions_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the document was reviewed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  "review_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_reviews_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval event */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being approved */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the approver */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the document was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, pending) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_approvals_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_approvals_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., pending, resolved) */,
  "comment_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the comment (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., PDF, DOCX, XLSX) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_files_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)
